titleStmt.title: SII 27.177: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 177. (A.R. No. 12 of 1938-39.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the second prākāra of Raṅganātha temple.

This damaged record registers a gift of the villages Seṁbiyanallūr, Ādityanalūru and Maṇachēri by the king for services in the temple of Raṅganātha on the occasion of his visit in the cyclic year Vijaya, Āshāḍha ba. 12. This tithi corresponds to 1533 A.D., July 18, Friday, though the details are in sufficient for verification. This might be the date intended.
It is published in S.I.I., Vol XXII, No. 412.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī manmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapradāpa mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāya [vibhāḍa Aṣṭa]dikkurāya manō bhayaṁkara pāṁḍiyarājya sthāpanācārya pūrvadakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara śrī Acyutta dēvamahārāyaru prithivirājyaṁgeyaluttiralu sāvirada nānūṟa Ayivatta nālaku rāyaṇarāju Ūmatturanu
miḷayada [veṁkaṭādri ?] vārisi būṁtavāri yi dēśu nayika Anaṁtaranūṁ tiruvaḍiyarājyakke maṁneyaru daṁnāḍavanū tīrada vijayastaṁbhavanū pokkisi tiruvaḍi pāṁveya rāja nūtarisi tuṁbici sāḷuvanāyakkaravarugaḷanū jeyisi nara yī kādasiyalū tulāpuruṣa mahādāna sahasra tarada dāna sahasra tarada dānagaḷige Ā
vijaya saṁvaccara Āśāḍa śi 12 lū śrī raṁgakke citayisi raṁganātha dēvaranū nōḍi raṁganātha dēvarige nitya yāgedina 1 kke 16 viramāṁna ha 1 Appa 1 Atirasa rāja Āṁmasāra U 3081Þ rāja veṁkaṭādriya Ubhaya vaḍagala
Ā Aḍike 2000 vīḷedele 2000 yī Ubha grāmagaḷa saha Uḷa guḍi grāma saha ravaḷanāḍu
koḍiya ha 4 meṇaselenāḍu maduvūru Uḷau 10 ko yidu Aṁtu 301 kāvēri seṁbiyanellūru grāma 1 toṁḍamaṁḍalaṁ Ādityanalūru grā 1 maṇacēri grāma 1 Aṁtu grāma 3 lu 201 yadelau Ācaṁdrārkasthāyi Āgi naḍavadu dharmakartta Acyutarāyara Āṁjñe saha 8 . = yī daralu Apa Atirasa citravāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyi Āgi naḍavadu yeṁdu yi sāśana barasidavanu basavayanu
barada sāsana
Digital edition of SII 27.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
